node_link.name: Git导出数据->生成历史文件记录

script.content:
const list = toHumpResult();
const gitTag = list[0]
klog.info(gitTag)
setResult('gitTag', gitTag)

<tpl>
select gt.*,da.name as app_name, da.short_name from dev_git_tag gt left join dev_application da on da.id=gt.repo where gt.id=#{id}
</tpl>

<tpl>

update
<if test = "isLargeVersion == true">
 dev_app_version_history 
</if>
<if test = "isLargeVersion == false">
 dev_application_version_history
</if>

set file_name=#{downloadFile} where id=#{historyId}

</tpl>

<tpl>

INSERT INTO 
<if test = "isLargeVersion == true">
 dev_app_version_history 
</if>
<if test = "isLargeVersion == false">
 dev_application_version_history
</if>

 (id, app_id, export_data,note, version, when_created, who_created) 
 values (#{historyId}, #{gitTag.repo}, #{request.body}, '',#{gitTag.tag}, #{sys.when}, #{sys.who})

</tpl>

extra.subFlowName: 获取kpine版本号判断是否大于等于指定版本（子流程）
